description: The Knowledge Reference Library for CPA practice (MagCPA Requirement 5): IRS guidelines, GAAP/GAAS manuals, IRS segment audit technique guides, and IDOR guidance as retrievable, EFFECTIVE-DATED references - versioned through the package mechanism so a 2027 question never retrieves 2025 rules. Ships both the 2025 and 2026 editions of the IRS small-business guide to exercise the effective-date selection. Content fields hold public-domain summaries/excerpts; licensed texts (FASB ASC) carry pointers, not reproductions. Quantitative IRS corporate tax ratios are deliberately NOT here - they are benchmark data (AI Analytical Source, category 6), set as tenant benchmarks against the Client Tax Risk Indicators framework.
name: CPA Knowledge Reference Library
publisher: MAG Dynamics (sources: IRS, AICPA, FASB, IDOR public guidance)

capabilities.name: Regulatory Reference Library
capabilities.description: Effective-dated retrieval of tax/accounting/audit references for agent citation.

knowledgeAssets.title: IRS Publication 334, Tax Guide for Small Business - 2025 edition
knowledgeAssets.summary: General federal income tax rules for small business returns, tax year 2025.
knowledgeAssets.contentText: 2025 edition. Applies to tax year 2025 returns. Flat corporate rate 21% (IRC s11, TCJA). Section 179 expensing limit and standard mileage rates per 2025 revenue procedures. Superseded for tax year 2026 by the 2026 edition.

knowledgeAssets.title: IRS Publication 334, Tax Guide for Small Business - 2026 edition
knowledgeAssets.summary: General federal income tax rules for small business returns, tax year 2026 - current edition.
knowledgeAssets.contentText: 2026 edition (current). Applies to tax year 2026 returns. Flat corporate rate 21% (IRC s11). Inflation-adjusted thresholds per 2026 revenue procedures. Remains effective until the 2027 edition is published as a new package version.

knowledgeAssets.title: FASB Accounting Standards Codification (GAAP) - 2026 view
knowledgeAssets.summary: US GAAP as codified by FASB; authoritative for financial statement preparation.
knowledgeAssets.contentText: POINTER (licensed content - not reproduced): FASB ASC via asc.fasb.org, firm subscription. Key active updates for 2026 engagements per ASU effective-date schedule. Cite specific ASC topics (e.g. ASC 606 revenue, ASC 842 leases) from the codification itself.

knowledgeAssets.title: AICPA Statements on Auditing Standards (GAAS) - 2026 compilation
knowledgeAssets.summary: Generally accepted auditing standards for non-issuer audits.
knowledgeAssets.contentText: AICPA SAS compilation applicable to 2026 audit engagements (AU-C sections). Includes quality management standards effective for engagements beginning after Dec 15, 2025 (SQMS 1/2, SAS 146).

knowledgeAssets.title: IRS Audit Technique Guides (segment audit guidelines) - 2026 set
knowledgeAssets.summary: Industry-segment examination guides IRS agents use; what examiners look for, by segment.
knowledgeAssets.contentText: Public IRS ATG set: cash-intensive businesses, construction, restaurants, attorneys, and other segments. Used to explain WHY a ratio deviation correlates with examination risk in a given segment. Indicators only - selection for examination is an IRS decision, never predictable from ratios alone.

knowledgeAssets.title: Illinois Department of Revenue guidance - 2026
knowledgeAssets.summary: Illinois income/replacement tax and sales tax guidance for 2026 filings.
knowledgeAssets.contentText: IDOR 2026 guidance: IL corporate income tax 7% plus 2.5% personal property replacement tax (9.5% combined for C corps); pass-through entity tax election available. Annual report obligations are with the Illinois Secretary of State, tracked as entity-level renewals.
